Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.storage.NPointer

Packages that use NPointer
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.storage
Provides components for managing memory storage and simulating mainframe-like data types.
com.nib.commons.utils
General purpose utility classes for common operations.
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.commands
CICS-like commands API classes.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.addressCwa(NPointer ptr, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Addresses the CWA (Common Work Area) and sets the pointer to its address.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.attachMain(NPointer ptr, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Attaches a pointer to previously allocated GETMAIN shared storage.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.getmain(NPointer ptr, int length, byte initimg, boolean shared, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Allocates main storage with the specified parameters.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.load(String program, NPointer set, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Loads a program and set its storage.
